# LifeCoach AI — Copilot Instructions
<!-- Project: LifeCoach AI | Stack: Flutter 3 · Firebase · GetX · Claude Sonnet 4.6 -->
<!-- Firebase project: lifecoachapp-upgraded | firebase_options.dart generated by FlutterFire CLI -->

## What this app is
An all-in-one personal AI life assistant (iOS + Android) combining habit tracking, health monitoring,
expense management, goal setting, task planning, and an AI coaching chat. Backend is fully serverless
via Firebase; AI is Claude Sonnet 4.6 called exclusively through Firebase Cloud Functions.

---

## Architecture — 4 strict layers (never skip one)

```
UI — GetView<XxxController> screens · Obx() for reactive reads · zero business logic
  ↓
GetX Controllers — XxxController extends GetxController · all Rx<T> state lives here
  ↓
Repositories / Services — lib/services/ wraps every Firebase SDK call
  ↓
Firebase — Firestore · Auth · Functions · Storage · FCM · Remote Config · Analytics · Crashlytics
```

**Hard rules:**
- Screens never import `cloud_firestore` — call a controller method instead
- Controllers never import `cloud_firestore` — call a repository method instead
- Claude API key is **never** in Flutter code — use `FirebaseFunctions.instance.httpsCallable('aiCoach')`
- Firebase is initialised in `main.dart` via `lib/firebase_options.dart` (`DefaultFirebaseOptions.currentPlatform`)

---

## Folder structure (feature-first)

```
lib/
├── main.dart                    # runApp + Firebase.initializeApp
├── firebase_options.dart        # generated by FlutterFire CLI — do not edit manually
├── app/
│   ├── routes/                  # AppRoutes (string constants), AppPages (route→screen+binding)
│   └── bindings/                # InitialBinding — registers global services at app start
├── features/
│   ├── auth/                    # LoginScreen, RegisterScreen, AuthController, AuthBinding
│   ├── dashboard/               # DashboardScreen (IndexedStack shell), DashboardController
│   ├── habits/                  # HabitsScreen, HabitController, HabitModel, HabitRepository
│   ├── health/                  # HealthScreen, HealthController, HealthLog, HealthRepository
│   ├── finance/                 # FinanceScreen, ExpenseController, ExpenseModel, FinanceRepository
│   ├── goals/                   # GoalsScreen, GoalController, GoalModel, GoalRepository
│   ├── planner/                 # PlannerScreen, PlannerController, TaskModel, PlannerRepository
│   ├── ai_coach/                # AiCoachScreen, AiCoachController, ChatMessage
│   └── profile/                 # ProfileScreen, ProfileController
├── services/                    # FirestoreService, AuthService, StorageService,
│                                #   CloudFunctionsService, NotificationService
└── shared/
    ├── constants/               # AppColors, AppStrings, AppSizes
    ├── widgets/                 # GlassCard, MetricTile, LoadingOverlay, EmptyState, ConfirmDialog
    └── utils/                   # DateUtils, CurrencyUtils, ValidationUtils
functions/                       # Firebase Cloud Functions (Node.js 20)
```

---

## Naming conventions

| Type | Pattern | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| Screen | `XxxScreen` | `HabitsScreen` |
| Controller | `XxxController` | `HabitController` |
| Repository | `XxxRepository` | `HabitRepository` |
| Model | `XxxModel` with `fromJson`/`toJson`/`copyWith` | `HabitModel` |
| Binding | `XxxBinding` | `HabitBinding` |
| Route constant | `AppRoutes.xxx` | `AppRoutes.habits` |

---

## GetX patterns — use exactly these

```dart
// Reactive state
final habits = <HabitModel>[].obs;        // RxList
final isLoading = false.obs;              // RxBool
final score = 0.obs;                      // RxInt

// Reactive UI — always Obx, never StreamBuilder in the UI layer
Obx(() => Text('${ctrl.score}'))

// Navigation — never push with BuildContext
Get.toNamed(AppRoutes.habits)

// Cross-controller access (controller must already be registered via its Binding)
Get.find<HabitController>()

// Side effects on state change
ever(habits, (_) => recalculateScore());

// Auto-save debounce (800 ms is the project standard)
debounce(amount, (_) => saveDraft(), time: const Duration(milliseconds: 800));

// Local storage — preferences, onboarding flag, selected theme
GetStorage().write('onboardingDone', true);
GetStorage().read<bool>('onboardingDone') ?? false;
```

---

## Firestore data structure

```
users/{uid}/
  habits/{habitId}        completedDates: List<String> (yyyy-MM-dd) · streak computed client-side
  health/{yyyy-MM-dd}     one doc per day — waterGlasses, sleepHours, mood(1-5), steps, weight
  expenses/{expenseId}    amount, currency(ISO), category enum, date, receiptUrl, isRecurring
  goals/{goalId}          milestones: List<Map> · progressPercent computed client-side
  tasks/{taskId}          priority enum, scheduledDate (yyyy-MM-dd), linkedGoalId, isCompleted
  chat/{messageId}        role: 'user' | 'assistant', content, timestamp
  reports/{reportId}      weekly AI summaries generated by Cloud Function
```

**Security rule — covers ALL subcollections via wildcard:**
```javascript
match /users/{userId}/{document=**} {
  allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == userId;
}
```

---

## AppColors (dark theme — MVP is dark-only)

```dart
static const primary        = Color(0xFF7C3AED); // purple
static const backgroundDark = Color(0xFF0F0F1A);
static const cardDark       = Color(0xFF1A1A2E);
static const surfaceDark    = Color(0xFF16213E);
static const textPrimary    = Color(0xFFE8E8F0);
static const textSecondary  = Color(0xFF8F8FA8);
```

Never hardcode colors in screens — always reference `AppColors.*`.

---

## AI Coach — critical security contract

```dart
// ✅ Correct — always via Cloud Function
final result = await FirebaseFunctions.instance
    .httpsCallable('aiCoach')
    .call({'message': text, 'context': contextPayload});

// ❌ Never — Anthropic API key must not exist anywhere in Flutter code
```

Context payload: `{ chatHistory(last 20), healthSummary, habitSummary, financeSummary, goalsSummary }`
Rate limit: 20 calls / user / day — enforced **in the Cloud Function**, not the app.
Model: `claude-sonnet-4-6`

---

## Firebase Cloud Functions (functions/ — Node.js 20)

| Function | Trigger | Purpose |
|----------|---------|---------|
| `aiCoach` | Callable (auth required) | Claude Sonnet 4.6 + rate limiting |
| `suggestMilestones` | Callable (auth required) | AI milestone suggestions for goals |
| `weeklyReport` | Cloud Scheduler — Sunday 21:00 | Weekly AI summary → Firestore + FCM |
| `habitReminder` | Cloud Scheduler | Per-user FCM at configured reminder time |
| `budgetAlert` | Firestore trigger on expenses | FCM when monthly spend > 80% of budget |

Store the Anthropic key with: `firebase functions:config:set anthropic.key="sk-..."` — never in source.

---

## Daily Life Score formula (DashboardController)

```dart
int get dailyScore => (
  (habitsCompletedToday / totalHabits * 35) +
  (sleepScore * 20)         +  // sleepHours / 8.0, capped at 1.0
  (waterProgress * 15)      +  // glassesToday / 8.0, capped at 1.0
  (budgetHealthScore * 20)  +  // 1 - (spentThisMonth / monthlyBudget), floor 0
  (goalProgressAvg * 10)       // avg progressPercent across active goals / 100
).clamp(0, 100).round();
```

---

## Developer commands

```bash
flutter pub get                                          # fetch dependencies
flutter analyze                                          # static analysis (run before every PR)
flutter test                                             # widget + unit tests
flutter format .                                         # format all Dart files
flutter run -d <device-id>                               # run on device/emulator
flutter build apk                                        # Android release
flutter build ios                                        # iOS (Xcode + codesign required)

flutterfire configure --project=lifecoachapp-upgraded    # regenerate firebase_options.dart

cd functions && npm install                              # install Cloud Function deps
firebase deploy --only functions                         # deploy Cloud Functions
firebase deploy --only firestore:rules                   # deploy security rules
```

---

## Key guardrails

- **Do not edit `lib/firebase_options.dart`** — regenerate with `flutterfire configure` instead
- **Do not change the bundle ID** (`com.example.lifecoachAppUpgraded`) without explicit instruction
- **Do not touch platform folders** for feature work — confine changes to `lib/` and `functions/`
- **Do not call `setState()`** — all state mutations go through `Rx<T>` variables
- **Do not call Firebase SDK directly from screens or controllers** — go through the service/repository layer

---

## Copilot prompt templates

```
// Controller
"Create a GetxController for [feature] that loads data from [Repository] via lib/services/FirestoreService,
exposes [fields] as Rx variables, and handles isLoading/error RxBool states."

// Repository
"Create a [Feature]Repository class. Inject FirestoreService. Methods: getAll(uid), add(uid, model),
update(uid, id, data), delete(uid, id). All return Future. Firestore path: users/{uid}/[collection]/{id}."

// Screen
"Create a Flutter screen extending GetView<[Controller]> using AppColors dark theme constants.
Show [content]. Use Obx() for all reactive data. No hardcoded colors or strings."

// Model
"Create a Dart model [Name]Model with fromJson(Map<String,dynamic>), toJson(), copyWith(). Fields: [fields]."

// Cloud Function
"Create a Firebase callable Cloud Function in Node.js 20 named [name]. Require Firebase Auth.
Validate input, handle errors with HttpsError. Include Firestore-based rate-limit check."
```
